tavern.name: The Rusty Dagger Tavern
tavern.desc: A lively tavern filled with the scent of roasted meat and spilt ale. A fire crackles cozy in the hearth. A path leads north into a dark forest.

npcs.name: merchant
npcs.desc: A stout dwarf merchant sitting behind a counter filled with wares.

behaviors.talk: Hello, adventurer! I have potions and weapons for sale.

dark_forest.name: The Whispering Forest
dark_forest.desc: Tall, gnarled trees block out most of the sky. The wind makes the branches whisper eerie warnings. The tavern path lies to the south, and a dark cave entrance is north.

items.name: shield
items.desc: An old wooden shield with iron reinforcements. It looks like it can absorb some damage.

npcs.name: goblin
npcs.desc: A small, green-skinned goblin clutching a dagger. He is muttering to himself.

behaviors.talk: Give me gold, or feel my blade!

goblin_cave.name: The Goblin Cave
goblin_cave.desc: A damp, echoing cavern littered with bones. The air is cold and smells of sulphur. The exit to the forest is south.

items.name: sword
items.desc: A heavy iron broadsword with a leather-wrapped grip. It is sharp and ready for battle.

npcs.name: dragon
npcs.desc: A massive, scaled red dragon sleeping on a small pile of treasure. It opens one fiery eye as you enter.

behaviors.talk: GRAAAAAWR! You dare disturb my slumber, mortal?!
